summary: Iter 206: Validated the PageShell (Truth Journey aesthetic) rollout across 8 main pages — /deals, /budget-exposure, /vault-documents, /webhooks-admin, /rbac-admin, /execution-rails, /adviser-hub, /retirement-workshop. All 8 pages render data-testid='page-shell', correct hero titles, gold (#D4A84C) accent text, exactly 4 KPI metrics in the top-right cluster, pill-shaped CTAs, navy (#1a2744) branding preserved. RetirementWorkshop standalone wraps in PageShell; embedded mode (used in /client/:id retirement tab and RetirementHub) returns plain content — verified in source (line 507: `if (embedded) return content;`). No 500/blank screens on regression (/ and /dashboard load Retirement Control Center). 100% pass on visual integrity criteria.

ui_bugs.issue: React console warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' — caused by bare <>...</> Fragment at line 115 inside PERMISSIONS.map. Should be <React.Fragment key={group}>. Non-breaking but pollutes console.

issues: PageShell metrics use data-testid='metric-confidence', and inner scenario cards also expose a 'CONFIDENCE' badge with the same testid pattern (10 elements match metric-* on this page vs. 4 expected). Not a visual bug — just a testid collision that may confuse future automation. Suggest namespacing scenario-card metrics differently.

/vault-documents.title: Document vault + '2 families' gold accent
/vault-documents.note: search + tag inputs visible inline; chip filter not used here which matches request

/adviser-hub.title: Client hub + '8 households' gold accent
/adviser-hub.note: All 7 tabs (All Clients/Portfolio/Activity/Segments/Comms/SOA-ROA/E-Sign) preserved; client cards grid with 8 households rendered correctly.

/retirement-workshop.title: Retirement workshop + 'David & Sarah Thompson' gold accent
/retirement-workshop.note: Standalone mode wraps in PageShell; embedded mode (RetirementHub.jsx:95, Client360View.jsx:94) passes embedded=true → returns plain content without PageShell wrapper. Verified in source line 507.

regression_check./: OK — h1='Retirement Control Center', body 4794 chars
regression_check./vault, /webhooks, /rbac: These short paths from the request do NOT exist as routes; actual routes are /vault-documents, /webhooks-admin, /rbac-admin. Unknown paths render empty body (no 404 fallback). Pre-existing, not introduced by this iteration.

action_items: RbacAdmin.jsx line 115: replace <> with <React.Fragment key={group}> inside PERMISSIONS.map to silence React key warning.

RetirementWorkshop scenario cards: rename inner 'metric-confidence' testid (or wrap in scenario-card scope like data-testid='scenario-metric-confidence') so it doesn't collide with PageShell's metric-confidence in test selectors.

Optional UX consistency: consider adding a chip filter on /webhooks-admin (active/disabled subs), /execution-rails (pending/completed), and /adviser-hub (segment chips) to fully match the Truth Journey aesthetic which encourages chip filters as the primary in-page navigator. Currently only /deals and /budget-exposure expose them.

Route naming discrepancy with the original request (request said /vault, /webhooks, /rbac — App actually serves /vault-documents, /webhooks-admin, /rbac-admin). Either add redirects or update routing docs.
critical_code_review_comments: PageShell.jsx generates metric testids from label text (toLowerCase + replace spaces with dashes). Special characters like '/' in 'Sims / scenario' produce 'metric-sims-/-scenario' — illegal-ish but works. Consider stripping non-alphanumerics.
RbacAdmin.jsx:115 — React.Fragment without key inside .map causes console warning on every render.

RetirementWorkshop.jsx standalone block (lines 510-538) duplicates the eyebrow/title/metrics/actions definition that already exists for the embedded inline header (lines 326-…). Could extract into a shared meta object to keep both paths in sync (DRY).
PageShell uses inline color literal '#D4A84C' / '#1a2744' in multiple components — already centralised in tailwind config? Verify tailwind theme tokens are used to avoid drift.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on PageShell rollout, 1 minor console warning

context_for_next_testing_agent: PageShell rollout fully verified on 8 routes. All show data-testid='page-shell', data-testid='page-title' with gold accent <span>, 4 metric-* testids in cluster, navy/gold branding intact. Embedded RetirementWorkshop confirmed not wrapping in PageShell (source line 507). Only outstanding: (1) React key warning on RbacAdmin line 115 (cosmetic), (2) metric testid collision on /retirement-workshop scenario cards. Routes /vault, /webhooks, /rbac in the original request do NOT exist; correct routes are /vault-documents, /webhooks-admin, /rbac-admin.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs. Single console warning RCA: RbacAdmin renders a <>...</> fragment as the direct child of PERMISSIONS.map((..)=>...), violating React's list-key requirement. Fix: change <> to <React.Fragment key={group}> and drop the redundant key={group} from the inner <tr>.
